description: Readable scaffold for prebuilt app tools that teachers can enable and configure in subject packs.
teacherBoundary: Teachers provide content, approval status, standards links, answer text, and safe configuration. Formula parsers, chemistry lookup code, routing, and model processing stay in app code.

tools.label: Formula Solver
tools.description: Prebuilt app logic for supported formula families.

tools.label: Chemistry Lookup
tools.description: Prebuilt app lookup for approved chemistry facts, elements, and compounds.

tools.label: Vocabulary Lookup
tools.description: Prebuilt app lookup for teacher-approved vocabulary and concept explanations.

tools.label: Science History
tools.description: Prebuilt app lookup for approved people, events, and timeline entries.

tools.label: Standards Tracker
tools.description: Prebuilt app support for linking questions and content to teacher-approved standard tags.
